passive.name: More Sparkles!
passive.description: Zoe's next basic attack after casting a spell deals bonus magic damage.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} After casting an ability, {{cis|Zoe}} next basic attack or ''{{ai|Spell Thief|Zoe}}'' bolt within a few seconds will deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} After casting an [[champion ability|ability]], '''Zoe''' empowers her next [[basic attack]] or ''{{ai|Spell Thief|Zoe}}'' bolt within 5 seconds to become {{tip|projectile|non-projectile}} and deal {{pp|16;20;24;28;32;36;42;48;54;60;66;74;82;90 to 130|color=magic damage}} {{as|(+ 20% AP)}} {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}}.
wiki_detail.notes: * The empowered attack will trigger but not be consumed against [[ward]]s.

Q.name: Paddle Star!
Q.description: Zoe fires a missile that she can redirect in flight. Deals more damage the longer it flies in a straight line.
Q.tooltip:
Zoe fires a star that deals increasing damage the further it travels to the first enemy hit and surrounding enemies -- between {{ totaldamagetooltip }} to {{ maxdamagetooltip }} magic damage.

Zoe can Recast this Ability to redirect the missile to a new position near Zoe.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

W.name: Spell Thief
W.description: Zoe can pick up the remnants of enemy summoner spell and active item casts and cast them once herself. Whenever she casts a summoner spell, she gains 3 missiles that fire at the nearest target.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive - Wheeeee:}} Whenever {{ci|Zoe}} casts ''Spell Thief'' or a summoner spell, she gains {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} for a short time. She also conjures 3 orbiting bolts for a period that will each shoot to the nearest enemy, dealing {{as|magic damage}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2:
{{sbc|Passive:}} Whenever an enemy champion casts a {{ccib|Summoner spell icon.png|summoner spell}} or {{ccib|Active ability item icon.png|Active ability items|item active}}, they drop the corresponding ''{{as|{{ccib|Spell Thief Minimap.png||Spell Shard}}|armor}}'' onto the ground for a while. Enemy {{tip|minions}} have a chance to spawn with random ''{{as|Spell Shards|armor}}'' that drop if '''Zoe''' kills them.

'''Zoe''' can collect a ''{{as|Spell Shard|armor}}'' for a while.
wiki_detail.blurb3: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Zoe''' mimics the active of the collected ''{{as|Spell Shard|armor}}''.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive - Wheeeee:}} Whenever '''Zoe''' casts ''Spell Thief'' or a summoner spell, she gains {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} for a duration, and summons three bolts that orbit her for the next 10 seconds.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Bonus Movement Speed|{{ap|30 to 70}}%}}<!--
-->{{st|Bonus Movement Speed Duration|{{ap|2 to 3}} seconds}}
wiki_detail.description2: If '''Zoe''' is not affected by {{tip|complete crowd control}}, she shoots one bolt at a time at the nearest non-{{tip|sleep|sleeping}} enemy in range, prioritizing her attack target, dealing {{as|magic damage}} with each bolt.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Magic Damage Per Bolt|{{ap|25 to 65}} {{as|(+ {{fd|13.{{Recurring|3}}}}% AP)}}|Total Magic Damage|{{ap|75 to 195}} {{as|(+ 40% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Passive:}} Whenever an enemy champion casts a {{ccib|Summoner spell icon.png|summoner spell}} or {{ccib|Active ability item icon.png|Active ability items|item active}}, they drop the corresponding ''{{as|{{ccib|Spell Thief Minimap.png||Spell Shard}}|armor}}'' onto the ground that grants {{tip|sight}} over a 100-radius area and remains for 40 seconds. Enemy {{tip|minions}} have a 10% chance to spawn with a random ''{{as|Spell Shard|armor}}'' that drops and remains for 20 seconds if '''Zoe''' kills them. Allied champions that kill them will cause the orb to drop only if '''Zoe''' is nearby.
wiki_detail.description4: '''Zoe''' can collect a ''{{as|Spell Shard|armor}}'' for 60 seconds, and replace it by moving directly onto another ''{{as|Spell Shard|armor}}''.
wiki_detail.description5: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Zoe''' mimics the active of the collected ''{{as|Spell Shard|armor}}''.
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tt|2200|Enemy cast spell shard drop radius}} / {{tt|Global|Minion spell shard radius}} / {{tt|1500|Ally minion kill spell shard drop radius}} / {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|525|Enemy lock-on range}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* Mimics the details of the mimicked active.
* '''Zoe''' will cast ''Spell Thief'' in place of her own summoner spells if she has either of them as a collected ''{{as|Spell Shard|armor}}'', even if she tries to cast the summoner spell while it is on cooldown.
* Minions that can drop ''{{as|Spell Shards|armor}}'' are marked with a tied cosmic balloon that floats above them.
** Minions do not drop a shard for {{si|Teleport}}.
* '''Zoe''' utilizes an attack-like animation whenever one of the bubbles hurls itself at an enemy, making it look as if she can attack while moving.
* '''Zoe''' cannot steal [[Consumable item|consumables]], [[trinket]]s, [[Item#Classification|component]] items, or items that create deployable or persistent effects. Some actives are excluded.
{{Zoe Spell Thief list}}
wiki_detail.flavorsound: {{sm2|Zoe_Original_W_15.ogg}} ''"You left a copy of your spell here. I took it. 'Kay thanks."''

E.name: Sleepy Trouble Bubble
E.description: Causes the target to become drowsy, then fall asleep. While asleep, the target's Magic Resist is reduced. The first source of damage that breaks the sleep is doubled, up to a cap.
E.tooltip:
Zoe dropkicks a bubble that deals {{ totaldamagetooltip }} magic damage, lingering as a trap if it hits nothing. The bubble's range is extended when flying over terrain.

After a delay, the victim falls Asleep and have their Magic Resist reduced by {{ percentpen*100 }}% for 2 seconds. Attacks and Ability hits wake them up but deal double damage, up to {{ breakdamagetooltip }} true damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Zoe}} kicks a bubble in the target direction that bursts upon the first enemy hit. At max range, it will linger as a trap for a few seconds that bursts upon enemy contact.
wiki_detail.blurb2: The burst deals {{as|magic damage}} and briefly inflicts {{tip|drowsy}}, which gradually {{tip|slows}} them. Afterwards, the target falls {{tip|sleep|asleep}} for a short time, during which they cannot act.
wiki_detail.blurb3: If the target is attacked during {{tip|Sleep}} by an enemy {{tip|champion}}, large {{tip|monster}}, or {{tip|turret}}, they wake up and take {{as|'''bonus''' true damage}} equal to the attack, up to a cap.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Zoe''' kicks a bubble in the target direction that bursts upon the first enemy hit, otherwise lingering at maximum range over 1 second, then becoming a trap for 5 seconds that bursts upon contact with an enemy. The bubble can move through [[terrain]] only once, but travels the entire distance as '''bonus''' range, and will fall short if it would enter terrain again.
wiki_detail.description2: The burst deals {{as|magic damage}} to the target and inflicts them with {{tip|drowsy}} for {{fd|1.4}} seconds, which gradually {{tip|slows}} them until they fall {{tip|sleep|asleep}} for {{fd|2.25}} seconds. While the target is {{tip|sleep|asleep}}, they are inflicted with {{sti|magic penetration|{{as|30% magic resistance reduction}}}}.
wiki_detail.description3: The next instance of non-{{tip|persistent damage|persistent}} damage that the {{tip|sleep|sleeping}} target takes from {{tip|champions}}, large {{tip|monsters}} or {{tip|turrets}} consumes the debuff to deal {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' true damage}}}} equal to the {{tt|post-mitigation damage|Damage calculated after modifiers}} dealt, capped at ''Sleepy Trouble Bubble's'' damage. The '''bonus''' damage is dealt before the triggering damage.
wiki_detail.leveling3: {{st|Bonus Damage Cap|{{ap|70 to 230}} {{as|(+ 45% AP)}}|Maximum Mixed Damage|{{ap|140 to 460}} {{as|(+ 90% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.range: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|800|Initial missile range}} + {{tt|50|Bounce extra travel distance}} + {{tt|250|Bubble radius}}
wiki_detail.width: {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|100|Initial missile width}} / {{tt|200|"Lollipop" diameter at end of initial missile trajectory, also edge range}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* '''Zoe''' will gain {{tip|obscured vision}} of the target while they're {{tip|sleep|asleep}} if they are not {{tip|sight|visible}}.
* If exceptionally close to terrain, the bubble will pass through without detection and will still be able to pass through a second piece of terrain - although it sacrifices any range its already used going through the first piece.
* ''Sleepy Trouble Bubble'' can interact with [[Terrain#Player-Generated|player-generated terrain]].
* ''Sleepy Trouble Bubble's'' range will be extended if '''Zoe''' casts it right before blinking back from {{ai|Portal Jump|Zoe}}. This is due to the range of the missile being measured at the start of the cast time and '''Zoe''' already having blinked back once the cast time finishes.
* At the end of the path of the initial missile, before continuing with the short bounce, ''Sleepy Trouble Bubble'' checks for targets in a {{tip|er|icononly = true}} 100 radius to immediately collide with.
** This "lollipop" is one of only a few that is larger than the ability's missile width.
* ''Sleepy Trouble Bubble'' can still be collided with during the short bounce between end of initial missile and the trap being formed.
** This seems to use a {{tip|er|icononly = true}} very small or negative collision radius, rather than normal missile collision.
{{Effect at cast time end}}
{{ct|cast|items=false|consume=false|spells=true,false,false,false,false}}

R.name: Portal Jump
R.description: Blink to a nearby position for 1 second. Then blink back.
R.tooltip: Zoe teleports to a nearby position for 1 second. Afterwards, she teleports back. Zoe can use Abilities and Attack, but can't move during this time.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Zoe}} {{tip|blinks}} in the target direction, after which she cannot move for a brief moment.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Afterwards, she {{tip|blinks}} back to her starting position.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Zoe''' {{tip|blinks}} in the target direction and remains there for {{fd|0.75}} seconds, during which she sets her {{as|movement speed}} to a {{as|static 0|ms}} and has {{tip|unobstructed vision}}. Afterwards, she {{tip|blinks}} back to her casting position.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Portal Jump {{tip|basic attack reset|resets}} '''Zoe's''' basic attack timer. '''Zoe''' is unable to basic attack and cast her abilities and movement spells for {{fd|0.75}} seconds after casting Portal Jump and for {{fd|0.5}} seconds after blinking back.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* '''Zoe''' will always {{tip|blink}} back.
** She will still be considered to blink even if she fails to move her intended location while {{tip|attach|attached}} (e.g. if she were affected by {{ai|The Show Stopper|Sett}}).
* '''Zoe''' can attack and cast abilities and movement spells at the target location for {{fd|0.5}} seconds after she is able to use them again.
* Upon reaching her destination, '''Zoe''' will either raspberry at the nearest enemy champion, or lick an ice cream cone when there are no enemy champions in {{tip|sight}}.
* '''Zoe''''s return position is shifted by 25 units in the target direction from her cast location.
{{ct|cast|items=false|consume=false|spells=true,false,false,false,false}}
